locations.name: 亞馬遜盆地
locations.summary: 亞馬遜盆地（葡萄牙語：Bacia do rio Amazonas），又稱亞馬遜平原，是南美洲的亞馬遜河及其支流所流經之處，盆地與平原地形兼具。 地理 南美洲的亞馬遜雨林（60%面積位於巴西）位於亞馬遜盆地，是全球最大的雨林，佔地6百萬平方…

locations.name: Várzea forest
locations.summary: A várzea forest is a seasonal floodplain forest inundated by whitewater rivers that occurs in the Amazon biome.

relations.subject: Dusky-headed parakeet
relations.evidence: Castelnau|journal=Revue et magasin de zoologie pure et appliquée|date=1851|volume=3|issue=5|page=209|url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/page/2321196|series=2nd ser.}} | synonyms=Conurus weddellii | range_map = Aratinga weddellii map.svg }} The dusky-headed parakeet (Aratinga weddellii), also known as Weddell's conure or dusky-headed conure in aviculture, is a small green Neotropical parrot with dusty grey head found in wooded habitats in the western Amazon basin of South America

relations.subject: Dusky-headed parakeet
relations.evidence: It prefers semiopen habitats such as várzea, forest edge, and forest remnants, but can also be found in coffee plantations
